title: Brown & Brown (BRO) is a Top-Ranked Growth Stock: Should You Buy?
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Expands Global Presence With Buyout
text: Brown & Brown's (BRO) buyout of Smithwick & Mariners will boost the acquirer's capabilities to serve the marine industry while Smithwick & Mariners will be able to leverage BRO's compelling portfolio.
